framework.name: Verifiable Intent as Cross-Protocol Interop Layer
framework.description: Mastercard positioned Verifiable Intent to be interoperable across Google's Agent Payments Protocol, Universal Commerce Protocol, and third-party protocols. It's open-sourced — meaning it's a standards play, not a product play.
framework.raw_quote: Mastercard has deliberately positioned Verifiable Intent to be interoperable across all of them.

source.title: Nasdaq's tokenization play isn't about 24/7 trading. It's ... - Linas's Newsletter
